response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identify songs: 'My Soul, Your Beats!' (00:00-03:44) and '管制塔より' (03:44-04:59) using on-screen text. 2. Performer: Hakui Koyori (birthday live). 3. Lyrics search: Used Google to find lyrics and translations for both songs. 4. JSON: Formatted data according to requirements.
response.global_summary: A video capturing a live performance by Hakui Koyori (with guests) for her birthday live 2026. The video features performances of the songs 'My Soul, Your Beats!' and '管制塔より' (Kanseitou yori).

scenes.description: The song 'My Soul, Your Beats!' is performed by three characters, including Hakui Koyori, on a concert stage. The song is the opening theme of 'Angel Beats!'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
目覚めては繰り返す 眠い朝は
襟のタイをきつく締め
教室のドアくぐると
ほんの少し胸を張って歩き出せる
そんな日常に吹き抜ける風
聞こえた気がした
感じた気がしたんだ
震え出す今この胸で
もう来る気がした
幾億の星が消え去ってくのを
見送った
手を振った
よかったねと

廊下の隅見下ろす 掃除の途中
おかしなものだと思う
あたしの中の時は止まってるのに
違う日々を生きてるように
誇りは雪のように降り積む
待ってる気がした
呼んでる気がしたんだ
震え出す今この時が
見つけた気がした
失われた記憶が呼び覚ました
物語
永遠のその終わり
いつの間にか駆け出してた
あなたに手を引かれてた
昨日は遠く明日はすぐ
そんな当たり前に心が踊った

聞こえた気がした
感じた気がしたんだ
震え出す今この胸で
もう来る気がした
幾千の朝を越え
新しい日が
待ってる気がした
呼んでる気がしたんだ
震えてるこの魂が
見つけた気がした
幾億の夢のように消え去れる日を
見送った
手を振った
ありがとうと
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
On a sleepy morning that I keep waking up to
I pull my necktie tight
And when I pass through my classroom door,
I can start walking with my chest puffed out just a little
The wind blows through such ordinary days
I realized I heard it
I realized I felt it
Now in my chest that started to tremble
I realized it was coming already
I saw off
The millions of stars that were disappearing
I waved my hand
Saying, 'Good for you'
I look down at the corner of the hallway in middle of cleaning
I think it's a strange thing
Even though the time inside of me has stopped
It feels like I'm living through different days
Dust falls and accumulates like snow
I realized you're waiting
I realized you're calling
Now in this time that started to tremble
I realized I found it
My lost memories recalled
My story
Of eternity
Its ending
I started running before I knew it
My hand was being pulled along by you
Yesterday was far away, tomorrow was right ahead
That natural fact made my heart dance
I realized I heard it
I realized I felt it
Now in my chest that started to tremble
I realized it was coming already
A new sun overcame thousands of mornings
I realized you're waiting
I realized you're calling
My soul is trembling
I realized I found it
I saw off
The day that's able to disappear like millions of dreams
I waved my hand
Saying, 'Thank you'

scenes.description: The song '管制塔より' (Kanseitou yori) is performed by Hakui Koyori alone on the concert stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ぽつり灯り 管制塔
砂嵐の向こうへ
祈るように綴った
これからのこと
ラジオネーム 匿名希望
お便り 届いていますか
この世界がいつからか
まるで他人事のように
やけに静かなので
不安になったのです
思い出したのです
人知れず口を噤んだまま
終われないのです
それは嫌なのです
夢ってもっと
わがままだったでしょう
応えてよ、笑ってよ、気付いてよ
此処に居るのにな、意地悪だな
誰にも届かない光を
どうしたら、伝えられるのでしょう
どうしても、伝えたいよ
ラジオネーム 匿名希望
意気地無しなのでしょうか
それともこの世界には
ぼくはお邪魔でしょうか
だとしても綴るよ
みっともなく叫ぶよ
フラれたって好きだよ
いいでしょ
いいでしょ
楽しかったよね
悔しかったよね
もう独り言は、嫌だ
「待たせちゃったかな」
「別に待ってないよ」
夢と呼んだ
それもぼくだっただけ
もういいかい
応えてよ、笑ってよ、気付いてよ
此処に居るのにな、意地悪だな
誰にも届かない光を
ぼくだけは、光と呼び続ける
真夜中 管制塔から
世界を明かしてやる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[A Faintly Lit Control Tower Toward The Other Side Of The Sandstorm]
[Things To Come Written Down Like A Prayer]
[Radio Name Anonymous Requested Has My Message Reached You?]
[Since When Did This World Feel Like Someone Else's Business?]
[Because It Is So Terribly Quiet]
[I Became Anxious And I Remembered]
[While Keeping My Mouth Shut Without Anyone Knowing]
[I Cannot Let It End I Hate That]
[Dreams Were Supposed To Be More Selfish Weren'T They?]
[Answer Me Laugh At Me Notice Me]
[Even Though I Am Right Here You Are Being Mean]
[What Should I Do With This Light That Reaches No One?]
[How Can I Convey It?]
[No Matter What I Want To Tell You]
[Radio Name Anonymous Requested Am I A Coward?]
[Or Am I Just An Intrusion In This World?]
[Even So I Will Write I Will Shout Shamefully]
[Even If I Am Rejected I Still Love You Isn'T That Okay?]
[Isn'T That Okay?]
[It Was Fun Wasn'T It It Was Frustrating Wasn'T It]
[I Am Tired Of Talking To Myself Now]
["Did I Keep You Waiting?" "I Wasn'T Really Waiting"]
[The Thing I Called A Dream Was Just Me Too Are You Ready?]
[Answer Me Laugh At Me Notice Me]
[Even Though I Am Right Here You Are Being Mean]
[Only I Will Keep Calling This Light That Reaches No One]
[A Light Continuously]
[From The Control Tower At Midnight]
[I Will Reveal You]
